name: Banana-Oatmeal-Pecan Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. Cream together the butter and honey in a medium-sized bowl until smooth.
3. Beat in the eggs, one at a time.
4. Stir in the bananas, buttermilk, and vanilla.
5. Mix in the baking powder, baking soda, and salt when well blended.
6. Gradually blend in the remaining ingredients.
7. Pour the mixture into a buttered loaf pan that is 9 inches by 5 inches by 3 inches.
8. Bake for 55 minutes.
9. Cool on a wire rack.
